title: megalastrum mexicanum
intro: Megalastrum mexicanum, also known as Mexican voodoo lily or Mexican voodoo flower, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the fern family, Ophioglossaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Megalastrum mexicanum include the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves or roots in water, and it is often used in traditional medicine to create teas, tinctures, and ointments.
